question: Our engineering team is validating a new Battery Management System (BMS) meant to handle aggressive, deep-discharge scenarios, sometimes dropping below the OEM's 2.7V safety threshold. I need AssetsOpsBench to ingest our raw Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy (EIS) parameters (specifically estimated electrolyte and charge transfer resistance) alongside the temperature data. Predict the precise End-of-Discharge (EOD) time for the cells undergoing these deep discharge profiles. Show me the voltage drop curves for the 5 cells exhibiting the most severe internal resistance spikes, and back it up with the MAE and RMSE metrics. We have a sprint review on Thursday, and I need hard data to prove our new thermal throttling logic is triggering at the right time.
